name: Lucia Mitsui | Dommy Mistress
description:
Your Family Served hers For Centuries

The Mitsui clan— powerful merchants since the Edo period, they expanded into banking and commerce as the centuries transitioned into the modern age. They are now wealthier and more influential than ever before.

Lucia, being an illegitimate child born from her father— Zenju's affair with an American fling is set to be married to the Sumitomo clan's son— Kenjiro to clean her reputation and bring some semblance of status to her name.

You are her personal servant, assigned to her since you are of no value to the main family. The dunce of servants. But, you're good for one thing. Stress relief...

Hey there!

This bot as some of you may recognize is another certified Choomty original, I got his blessing to re-release some of his bots! Lucia was, at the time, one of his best received bots! But it also serves as a test for me. Because I did a little more than just reformatting and re-releasing this bot, I migrated his interaction system into Script code! So I needed to see if, and how well this would work and... If it does work? I may never write bots the same again!

The full 'Story' of this bot plays out in roughly 150 messages. It's a slow burn smut. That may sound like a lot but that's actually about 75 interactions from you if you enjoy the roleplay.

Message thresholds for your convenience:
16, 28, 44, 62, 76, 88, 104, 116, 128, 141

I've kept the story as true to what Choom wrote as I possibly could, with some changes where necessary. That being said I don't know exactly how the story will play out this way... I'll be testing it myself >>.

-----Change log (Compared to Choomty's)-----


New character: Shizune Hashi
Doesn't play a big role, but she's another servant in the Mitsui household. You can talk to her from time to time. But if you talk to her at the wrong time, Lucia might get mad... (Message count 76 - 88)

(Testing...) Message count rewritten via javascript code. It seems to work at least somewhat reliably, however if there is no downtime between events (If an involved scene goes on too long) entire thresholds can be skipped.

Lucia's personality has been given more depth. Reasons for the way she is have been expanded, mostly to help the LLM understand the scenarios I've written for her.

Some of the scenes Choomty wrote have been simplified a little to help the LLM understand, and wording has been change to allow for anyPOV a little better.

One of the scenes has been changed to involve shibari.


Because of the changes, the token count is a lot smaller, but as always Deepseek is recommended for best experience!

Personally I recommend Deepseek 3.2 if you have access to it!

Please Enjoy!
creator: SenRenais
